services.title: Services
services.rfq.sent: RFQ yatumizidwa ku {count, plural, one {# vendor} other {# vendors}}

browse.title: Services
browse.subtitle: Pezani opereka services oodalirika mu Zambia yonse — kuchokera ku beauty mpaka home repairs.
browse.emptyTitle: Palibe services zogwirizana ndi filters zanu
browse.emptyBody: Yesani category kapena area ina, kapena bweraninso posachedwa pa listings zatsopano.

detail.metaDescription: {title} mu {area}. Onani portfolio ndi kupempha quote pa Vergeo5.
detail.requestQuoteHint: Fotokozani ntchito yanu ndi kulandira quotes kuchokera kwa providers ogwirizana.

list.title: Services zanu
list.intro: Manage listings za services zomwe makasitomala angawone ndi kupempha quotes.

form.includesHint: Chimodzi pa line — chimaonetsedwa ngati checklist pa service page yanu.
form.bookableHint: Makasitomala angabook ndi kulipira deposit pa fixed price, popanda kupempha quote first.
form.bookingPriceHint: Total price ya direct booking. Makasitomala amalipira deposit tsopano ndi balance ntchito ikatha.

errors.bookablePrice: Ikani fixed booking price yoposa zero kuti mulole direct booking.

postJob.title: Postani ntchito
postJob.subtitle: Fotokozani zomwe mukufuna — providers ogwirizana adzatuma quotes.

description.label: Chiyani mukufuna kuchita?
description.placeholder: E.g. Konza kitchen tap yotayika before Saturday

photos.label: Zithunzi (optional)
photos.help: Mpaka 8 photos kuti muthandize providers kumvetsetsa ntchito.

postJob.draftSaved: Draft yanu yasungidwa pa device iyi mpaka mulowe.

ack.sent: Tawadziwitsa providers ogwirizana. Quotes nthawi zambiri zimafika mkati mwa tsiku.
ack.noMatch: Situnapeza providers ogwirizana panopa, koma tipitiriza kufunafuna ndi kukudziwitsani.

list.title: Ntchito zanu
list.intro: Compare quotes kuchokera kwa providers ndi kusankha yabwino.
list.emptyBody: Postani ntchito kuti mulandire quotes kuchokera kwa providers ogwirizana.

quotes.compareIntro: Sorted by price, kenako provider rating. Quotes za withdrawn ndi expired zabisika.
quotes.empty: Palibe quotes za active pano — providers nthawi zambiri amayankha mkati mwa tsiku.

decline.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Price yayikulu, ndikufuna date yachangu…

errors.forbidden: Mutha kufanizira quotes pa ntchito zanu zokha.

accept.title: Vomereza quote iyi
accept.intro: Lipirani deposit ya {pct}% tsopano kuti musunge {vendor}. Balance ikufunika ntchito ikatha.
accept.escrowNote: Deposit yanu yasungidwa ndi Vergeo5 ndipo imatulutsidwa kwa provider pokhapokha ntchito yatsimikizidwa.

errors.notOwner: Mutha kuvomereza quotes pa ntchito zanu zokha.
errors.mismatch: Quote iyoyo si ya ntchito iyi.

provider.title: Markani ntchito yatha
provider.intro: Dziwitsani customer kuti ntchito yatha. Ali ndi maola 48 kutsimikiza before auto-confirm ndi kutulutsa payment yanu.

errors.notProvider: Provider woyikidwa yekha angamarke ntchito iyi yatha.

customer.title: Tsimikizani kuti ntchito yatha
customer.intro: Tsimikizani kuti mutulutse balance kwa provider wanu. Ngati simuchita kanthu, tidzatsimikiza automatic pambuyo pa maola 48.
customer.awaitingProvider: Tikudikira provider wanu amarke ntchito yatha.
customer.escrowNote: Munalipira → Yasungidwa ndi Vergeo5 → Yatulusidwa kwa provider mukatsimikiza.
customer.reviewUnlocked: Zikomo! Mutha kusiya review pa provider uyu.

errors.notMarked: Provider wanu sanamarke ntchito yatha pano.

reviews.heading: Reviews za provider uyu
reviews.subheading: Kuchokera kwa makasitomala omwe ntchito zao provider uyu anamaliza.

form.title: Rate provider wanu
form.intro: Ntchito yanu yatha — gawani mmene zinakhalira.

errors.rateLimited: Ma review request ambiri. Dikirani pang'ono.

booking.title: Bookani service iyi
booking.intro: Lipirani deposit ya {pct}% tsopano; balance ikufunika ntchito ikatha.
booking.escrowNote: Mulipira → Yasungidwa ndi Vergeo5 → Yatulusidwa kwa provider mukatsimikiza kuti ntchito yatha.

errors.authRequired: Chonde lowani kuti mubooke service iyi.
errors.notBookable: Service iyi silipo pa direct booking panopa.
